title: onobrychis viciifolia f. pallens
intro: Onobrychis viciifolia f. pallens, also known as a form of sainfoin, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Asia, and the Middle East. It is a type of plant used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis viciifolia f. pallens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a nutritional supplement, particularly in the form of sainfoin hay for livestock.
